stars.name: Star of Identity
stars.summary: Anchors the self in Christ; guards against fragmentation and false selves.

stars.name: Star of Obedience
stars.summary: Trains the will to remain loyal under pressure and persecution.

stars.name: Star of Discernment
stars.summary: Separates true teaching from flattering deception and spiritual flattery.

stars.name: Star of Repentance
stars.summary: Keeps the conscience soft and responsive to correction.

stars.name: Star of Endurance
stars.summary: Trains the soul to remain under trial without breaking or fleeing.

stars.name: Star of Watchfulness
stars.summary: Prevents spiritual sleep; keeps the inner guard awake.

stars.name: Star of Communion
stars.summary: Centers everything on shared life with Christ, not just performance.
